Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Gibson Amphitheatre (Universal Studios Hollywood)
Universal City, CA
Previous Names:
Universal Amphitheatre (Universal Studios Hollywood) (Changed after 2004)
Seating Capacity: 6251
Venue Type : Auditorium

Total Gigs: 5
  DMB  (4)
  DMB & The Roots  (1)

Longest Performance:
11.16.96 - Jimi Thing (14:54)
Venue Picture
Description
MTV Music Awards, VH1 Honors, NAACP Image Awards, the Academy of Country Music Awards, HBO's Comic Relief, and Aids Project Los Angeles' Commitment to Life events have all been held at Universal Amphitheatre, as well as appearances by a Pope and an American President. Although most "amphitheatres" are outdoors, Universal Amphitheatre was an indoor auditorium venue. It was demolished after the 2013 season to make way for the Harry Potter World attraction.
